RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0009 Page 1 of 2 APR Rate Matrix by FICO × LTV FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 580-619 7.64% 4.15% 11.55% 10.56% 11.07% 620-659 5.67% 8.19% 13.33% 8.32% 6.66% 660-699 11.12% 7.46% 13.25% 10.6% 6.17% Co-signer required — UW
